title: Here's how to reduce approval bottlenecks

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
52% of companies miss deadlines because of approval bottlenecks (yes, you read that right).

SuperMail aims to reduce this number by making it possible to receive approvals directly from an email. No third-party logins, no searching for passwords, no approvals getting lost before they hit your monday.com board.

See how it works https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2oC4bLgl1fE&t=3s

Status Change Button (2)1920×1080 304 KB

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml: @SariHoltz Not objective but I love it!
